headline: Lilly’s obesity pill gets US approval in challenge to Novo
summary: (Bloomberg) -- Eli Lilly & Co.’s weight-loss pill won US approval, ratcheting up pressure on Novo Nordisk A/S, which launched an obesity pill earlier this year. Lilly’s once daily pill, called Foundayo, was approved to help people shed pounds or maintain previous weight loss, the US Food and Drug Administration said in a statement. The lowest doses of Foundayo will cost $149 a month for patients who pay in cash.The review process took less than four months thanks to a new FDA program designed to

headline: FDA approves Lilly's Foundayo™ (orforglipron), the only GLP-1 pill for weight loss that can be taken any time of day without food or water restrictions
summary: Eli Lilly and Company (NYSE: LLY) today announced the U.S. Food and Drug Administration (FDA) approved Foundayo™ (orforglipron) for adults with obesity, or overweight with weight-related medical problems. When used alongside a reduced-calorie diet and increased physical activity, Foundayo helps individuals lose excess body weight and keep the weight off. Foundayo will be available via LillyDirect®, with prescriptions accepted immediately and shipping beginning April 6, followed shortly after by

headline: SpaceX files confidential IPO, Eli Lilly's obesity pill gets US approval
summary: Yahoo Finance Senior Producer John Hyland tracks today's top moving stocks and biggest market stories in this Market Minute.US stocks (^DJI, ^GSPC, ^IXIC) kick off the second quarter of 2026 ahead of President Trump's address to the nation on Wednesday at 9 P.M.Elon Musk's SpaceX (SPAX.PVT) has reportedly filed confidentially for an IPO, according to Bloomberg.Eli Lilly's (LLY) stock rises after its obesity pill gets approval by US regulators, intensifying competition with Novo Nordisk (NVO).

content.title: SpaceX files confidential IPO, Eli Lilly's obesity pill gets US approval
content.description:
Yahoo Finance Senior Producer John Hyland tracks today's top moving stocks and biggest market stories in this Market Minute.

US stocks (^DJI, ^GSPC, ^IXIC) kick off the second quarter of 2026 ahead of President Trump's address to the nation on Wednesday at 9 P.M.

Elon Musk's SpaceX (SPAX.PVT) has reportedly filed confidentially for an IPO, according to Bloomberg.

Eli Lilly's (LLY) stock rises after its obesity pill gets approval by US regulators, intensifying competition with Novo Nordisk (NVO).
content.summary: Yahoo Finance Senior Producer John Hyland tracks today's top moving stocks and biggest market stories in this Market Minute.US stocks (^DJI, ^GSPC, ^IXIC) kick off the second quarter of 2026 ahead of President Trump's address to the nation on Wednesday at 9 P.M.Elon Musk's SpaceX (SPAX.PVT) has reportedly filed confidentially for an IPO, according to Bloomberg.Eli Lilly's (LLY) stock rises after its obesity pill gets approval by US regulators, intensifying competition with Novo Nordisk (NVO).

headline: Eli Lilly Stock Jumps as Weight-Loss Pill Enters the Market. What It Means for Novo Nordisk.
summary: Eli Lilly  stock rose sharply on Wednesday after the Food and Drug Administration approved the company’s oral obesity medication, which will become available through Lilly’s direct-to-consumer online pharmacy this month.  Doses will start at at $25 a month for patients with insurance coverage and $149 for those who pay out of pocket.  Foundayo will be available through U.S. retail pharmacies and telehealth platforms at a later date, Lilly said.

content.title: Eli Lilly Stock Jumps as Weight-Loss Pill Enters the Market. What It Means for Novo Nordisk.

Doses will start at at $25 a month for patients with insurance coverage and $149 for those who pay out of pocket.  Foundayo will be available through U.S. retail pharmacies and telehealth platforms at a later date, Lilly said.
